about.title: About Kuma
about.kuroDescription: SDM primer batch design tool with Tm-guided overlap extension.
about.mameSummary: Desktop verdict analysis tool for NB-plate mutagenesis runs.
about.mameBuiltWith: Built with Tauri + React + Python sidecar.
about.licenseText: Internal use, KRIBB C1 Lab - DOI/citation forthcoming
about.thirdPartyLicensesDesc: Open-source components bundled with this application.
about.licensesNotBundled: Third-party licenses available in distribution package.
about.mameNoExternalServices: MAME does not use external network services. All analysis runs locally.
about.diagnosticsNote: Saves a JSON bundle (app info + crash log) to a location you choose. No user data or sequences are included.

settings.title: Settings
settings.colorblindModeDesc: Adds shape markers to status indicators so colors are not the only differentiator.
settings.notificationsNote: Fired for jobs lasting longer than 5 minutes.
settings.sleepPrevention: Sleep prevention: enabled while jobs run.

parameters.title: Parameters
parameters.subtitle: Thresholds and ingest mode for this batch.
parameters.targetAmpliconLengthHelp: Expected amplicon length after barcode sorting. Leave blank to auto-detect from sample reads; set manually when the distribution is noisy.
parameters.targetAmpliconLengthAriaLabel: Target amplicon length in bp; leave blank to auto-detect
parameters.lengthToleranceHelp: Allowed window around target amplicon length. Reads outside target ± tolerance are filtered when length filtering is active.
parameters.minQscoreHelp: Minimum per-read qscore threshold when sequencing_summary metadata is available.
parameters.minBarcodeScoreHelp: Minimum MinKNOW barcode_score threshold when sequencing_summary metadata is available.
parameters.trimAdaptersHelp: Optionally trims the forward barcode and universal reverse primer from assigned reads before downstream FASTA output.
parameters.universalRevPrimerHelp: Universal reverse primer sequence in 5′ to 3′ orientation. Used only when Trim Adapters is enabled.
parameters.normalizeHeadersHelp: Writes the well name into FASTA headers instead of preserving ONT read IDs. This makes downstream per-well parsing more consistent.
parameters.rawRunOptionsAriaLabel: Raw run demux and filter options
parameters.barcodeRunsAutomatically: Barcode sorting runs automatically when you press the main Run button.
parameters.cdsStartHelp: 0-based CDS start offset used when translating consensus sequence to amino acids.
parameters.cdsEndHelp: CDS end coordinate used for translation. Must match the reference FASTA frame.
parameters.manyCutoffHelp: Number of observed amino-acid changes above which a result is classified as MANY.
parameters.bimodalTooltip: Distribution looks bimodal. Recommended uses knee detection.
parameters.trimAdaptersAriaLabel: Trim forward barcode and universal reverse primer from reads
parameters.universalRevPrimerAriaLabel: Universal reverse primer sequence 5 prime to 3 prime
parameters.normalizeHeadersAriaLabel: Write well name as FASTA header instead of ONT read ID
parameters.legacyKbCutoffAriaLabel: Legacy min file size KB cutoff (proxy for read depth)
parameters.autoDetectedAriaLabel: Auto-detected amplicon length: {{length}} bp, confidence {{confidence}}, sampled {{reads}} reads
parameters.modeAmpliconTitle: Linear PCR amplicon target. Reads cover a single defined region; consensus called per barcode within that region.
parameters.modePlasmidTitle: Circular plasmid target. Reads can wrap the origin; consensus accounts for full plasmid topology.
parameters.ingestBarcodeTitle: Group reads by Nanopore barcode (NB01, NB02, ...). Each barcode bin becomes one sample.
parameters.ingestAmpliconTitle: Group reads by amplicon identity. Use when multiple amplicons share a barcode or when demultiplexing by sequence match.
parameters.inputModeConsensusTitle: Start from pre-computed consensus FASTA (one sequence per barcode). Skips sorting and consensus calling.
parameters.inputModeSortedBarcodeTitle: Start from already-sorted barcode directories (fastq.gz per barcode). Skips MinKNOW sorting; runs consensus calling.
parameters.inputModeRawRunTitle: Start from a raw MinKNOW run folder (fastq_pass/ + run metadata). Full pipeline: sort barcodes, filter, then consensus.
parameters.minFilteredDepthHelp: Cutoff based on read count passing the length-window filter. This is the primary depth-based quality cutoff.
parameters.minFilteredDepthAria: Min filtered depth (reads). Length-window-filtered read count cutoff.
parameters.minFilteredDepthTitle: Primary depth cutoff. Based on reads passing the length-window filter.
parameters.minFilteredDepthFootnote: Length-window-filtered read count. ONT R10.4.1 consensus: Q35+ ~15x. Does not convert 1:1 with legacy KB cutoff.
parameters.legacyKbHelp: Legacy cutoff using FASTA file size as a proxy for read depth. Affected by compression ratio, length distribution, and library variation.
parameters.legacyKbTooltip: File-size-based proxy cutoff. Affected by compression ratio, length distribution, and library variation. Use as reference only.

barcodeSetup.title: Barcode Package Setup
barcodeSetup.subtitle: Generate a MAME barcode package from a CDS FASTA and barcode seed file.
barcodeSetup.cdsFastaHelper: Reference CDS sequence (FASTA, GenBank, or SnapGene .dna). gene_start / gene_end are 0-based indices into this sequence.
barcodeSetup.toastSuccessDescWithLength: Amplicon length: {{length}} bp. Files saved to design/
barcodeSetup.geneEndError: gene_end must be greater than gene_start.
barcodeSetup.noProjectWarning: A project must be open to generate a package. Select Open Project from the File menu.
barcodeSetup.barcodeSeedsXlsxHelper: xlsx file containing fwd_1..12 and rev_1..8 seed sequences.
barcodeSetup.polymeraseQ5Title: NEB Q5 High-Fidelity. Tm preset ~72 °C, low Mg²⁺. Default choice for high-fidelity amplification.
barcodeSetup.polymeraseTaqTitle: Standard Taq polymerase. Tm preset ~60 °C, higher Mg²⁺. Use for routine PCR or when 3'A overhangs are desired.
barcodeSetup.polymerasePhusionTitle: Thermo Phusion High-Fidelity. Tm preset ~72 °C, blunt-end, fast extension.
barcodeSetup.polymeraseKODTitle: Toyobo KOD One / KOD Hot Start. Tm preset ~68 °C with Mg²⁺/dNTP correction. High-fidelity, fast.
barcodeSetup.cdsCandidateNoneDetected: No CDS detected. Enter coordinates manually.

activity.title: Activity data
activity.subtitle: Enter this phase once wet-lab activity measurements are ready (typically days to weeks after Phase 1 Barcode Setup and Phase 2 Analyze). Load measurements, merge with genotype, then export the EVOLVEpro training input.

ingest.uploadDesc: Load a long-format CSV / Excel file (well, replicate, value columns) into the current Round.
ingest.wtDesc: Designate the wild-type wells used for normalisation. Must be set before Merge.

merge.heading: Merge activity with genotype
merge.desc: Join uploaded activity with the Round genotype and normalise by WT.
merge.btnEvolveproAria: Run v0.3 RPC: replicate merge + label-swap guard

export.heading: Export EVOLVEpro xlsx
export.desc: Save the merged table as an EVOLVEpro training input xlsx (strict 2-column [Variant, activity] format, short variant notation such as F89W → 89W).

exportBlocked.title: Export blocked — label-swap detected
exportBlocked.body: Compare with the previous round's EVOLVEpro result and verify the label mapping for variants that share an activity value.

runHealth.noMinKnow: MinKNOW raw run directory not detected. Pore yield, throughput, and barcode charts are unavailable.
runHealth.figureVerdictBreakdownCaption: Stacked bar showing PASS, Ambiguous, Fail, and Fallback counts per plate.
runHealth.figureFileSizeCaptionBase: 7-bucket file size histogram. Suggested cutoff at {{cutoffKb}} KB using {{method}} method.
runHealth.figureFileSizeCaptionBimodal: 7-bucket file size histogram. Suggested cutoff at {{cutoffKb}} KB using {{method}} method. Bimodal distribution detected.
runHealth.fileSizeAriaLabel: File size distribution histogram. Suggested cutoff: {{cutoffKb}} KB ({{method}})
runHealth.fileSizeAriaLabelBimodal: File size distribution histogram. Suggested cutoff: {{cutoffKb}} KB ({{method}}), bimodal distribution detected
runHealth.figureBarcodeCaption: Horizontal bar chart showing read counts for each detected barcode.
runHealth.figureThroughputCaption: Line chart showing reads per second from experiment start to {{maxTime}} hours.

verdictTable.emptyDesc: Run analysis to populate the verdict table.
verdictTable.noMatchDesc: No results match the current search or filter.

menuBar.restartSidecarConfirm: Analysis is running. Restart sidecar anyway?

appLayout.deadlockDescription: No progress update for 30+ seconds. The job is stuck.

export.title: Export Results
export.descriptionBase: Save the complete verdict set as an Excel workbook.
export.openFolderAriaLabel: Open export folder in file explorer

janusMapping.title: Export Janus Mapping
janusMapping.description: Export the final cell-stock Janus mapping file (K4 spec) as CSV or XLSX.
janusMapping.outputPathAriaLabel: Output file path for Janus mapping
janusMapping.browseAriaLabel: Browse save path for Janus mapping
janusMapping.columnsNote: Columns: well, custom_barcode, variant, verdict, and plate coordinates.
janusMapping.phase1Note: Phase 1: only passed wells are included.

runReport.title: Export Run Report
runReport.description: Export a one-page run summary report as HTML or PDF.
runReport.outputPathAriaLabel: Output file path for run report
runReport.browseAriaLabel: Browse save path for run report
runReport.pdfNote: PDF export requires weasyprint. If not installed, the report is saved as HTML.
runReport.fallbackNotice: weasyprint not found — report was saved as HTML instead.

inputPanel.title: Input files
inputPanel.subtitle: Primary run inputs and output location.
inputPanel.redetectAriaLabel: Re-detect input files from project directory

consensus.label: Consensus FASTA folder
consensus.helperText: Folder with pre-sorted per-well FASTA files (consensus mode)

sorted_barcode.label: Sorted barcode folder
sorted_barcode.placeholder: Folder containing sorted barcode FASTA files
sorted_barcode.helperText: Folder with sorted barcode FASTA outputs from demux

kuroXlsx.label: KURO xlsx
kuroXlsx.helpText: The expected_mutations .xlsx file exported from KURO. MAME compares the expected mutations in this file against NGS consensus results.

referenceFasta.label: Reference FASTA
referenceFasta.helperText: Reference sequence used for variant calling against consensus
referenceFasta.helpText: Reference FASTA used as the baseline for variant calling. Using the same reference as KURO design is recommended.

customBarcodes.label: Custom Barcodes (xlsx or csv)
customBarcodes.helperText: Combinatorial barcode definition used before analysis
customBarcodes.helpText: Raw MinKNOW run mode uses this file to assign reads to per-well FASTA outputs before analysis.

sampleMap.label: Sample Map (optional)
sampleMap.helperText: Well-to-sample name mapping — adds mutant name to sorted FASTA filenames (e.g. A01_V5F_F1_R1.fasta)
sampleMap.helpText: Col A: sample name, Col B: well position (e.g. A1). Compatible with KURO mutants.xlsx layout.

exportDest.label: Export destination folder
exportDest.placeholder: Choose a folder; {{filename}} will be created
exportDest.helperText: Analysis report will use a KURO-style rule-based .xlsx filename
exportDest.helpText: Folder where the analysis result Excel will be saved. The filename is auto-generated using KURO-style rules combining date, reference/input tokens, MAME target, and result count tokens.

parameterPanel.title: Parameters
parameterPanel.strategyHint_partial: Forward and reverse are independent with overlap upstream of the codon.
parameterPanel.strategyHint_full: Reverse = rc(forward). Single primer Tm and length apply to both.
parameterPanel.strategyHelp:
Partial (Gibson): overlap upstream of the codon; fwd and rev are independent.
Full (Q5 SDM): rev = rc(fwd); single primer covers the mutation.
parameterPanel.strategyOption_partial_title: Gibson assembly style. Forward and reverse primers are independent; overlap is placed upstream of the target codon. Standard for in-house SDM.
parameterPanel.strategyOption_full_title: NEB Q5 SDM kit style. Reverse primer = reverse-complement of forward; a single back-to-back primer pair covers the mutation site.
parameterPanel.polymeraseHelp:
Selects Tm calculation preset (extension Tm target + tolerance defaults).
Choose the polymerase used in your SDM reaction.
Use 'Custom Polymerase' to define your own extension Tm.
parameterPanel.codonHelp:
Applies only to the mutation site codon (3 nt). Flanking primer sequence remains wild-type.

Min. changes: fewest nucleotide changes from wild-type codon (minimises synthesis cost).
Optimal: highest-frequency codon for the selected organism (maximises expression).
parameterPanel.codonOption_closest: Min. changes (fewest nt changes from WT)
parameterPanel.codonOption_closest_title: Pick the mutant codon with the fewest nucleotide changes from the wild-type codon. Minimises primer mismatch and synthesis cost. Only the mutation codon (3 nt) is altered.
parameterPanel.codonOption_optimal_title: Pick the highest-frequency codon for the selected organism's codon usage table. Maximises expression but may require more nt changes. Only the mutation codon (3 nt) is altered.
parameterPanel.mutationsHelp:
Maximum number of primer designs to generate.
For EVOLVEpro / multi-evolve mode: capped by the CSV variant count.
One 96-well plate fits 95 mutants + 1 WT control.
parameterPanel.tmPrimerTitle: Single Tm target. rev = rc(fwd), so both primers share Tm by construction.
parameterPanel.tmTolHelp: Allowed deviation from Tm targets. Cascade stages add delta on top. Recommended 2-5°C.
parameterPanel.gcHelp:
Recommended range: 40–60%.
Primers outside this range receive a penalty score.
Very low GC (<30%) or very high GC (>70%) reduces synthesis quality.
parameterPanel.gcRangeTitle: Recommended range: 40-60%. Primers outside this range receive a penalty.
parameterPanel.gcInvalidError: Min must be less than Max
parameterPanel.primerLenHelp:
KOD One PCR Master Mix
  Standard:     22–35 bp, Tm >63°C
  Long targets: 25–35 bp, Tm >65°C

Experimental (IspS SDM, n=165)
  Forward total: 19–38 bp (incl. overlap)
  Reverse total: 18–32 bp (incl. overlap)

KURO primer length = overlap + priming region
parameterPanel.primerLenSingleTitle: Single length range applies to both primers (rev = rc(fwd)).
parameterPanel.primerLenInvalidError: Min must be less than Max
parameterPanel.autoRescueTitle: When enabled, retries failed mutations through 4 (top-N) or 6 (pipeline) stages of relaxed parameters. When disabled, failed mutations remain as-is with no auto-retry.
parameterPanel.seedTitle: Optional integer seed. Will be passed to the backend and recorded in run manifests once manifest wiring is complete (backend integration pending).

diversitySections.linkerHelp: Choose whether non-domain residues only backfill spare slots, get their own quota bin, or are excluded from Step 2 entirely.
diversitySections.helpTip3D: Selects variants spread apart in 3D space using AlphaFold Cα coordinates.
diversitySections.helpTip1D: Greedy Pareto selection that maximises minimum sequence-distance between chosen positions.
diversitySections.roundHelp:
Round × size = cumulative data points used to estimate model quality (ρ).
Lower ρ → wider pool and higher entropy weight for exploration.
diversitySections.positionCapHelp: Max substitutions per residue. Cap=1 keeps one best variant per position. Uses Grantham-distance tie-break when scores are within 2%.
diversitySections.domainStrategyHelp: Proportional: quota proportional to domain length. Equal: same quota per domain.
diversitySections.distanceHelp: Auto uses AlphaFold Cα when structure is loaded. Force 1D/3D for controlled comparisons.
diversitySections.poolKTitle: Manual pool size override (ignored when Round > 0)
diversitySections.poolKHelp:
Manual pool multiplier. Ignored when EVOLVEpro Round ≥ 1 (σ-adaptive mode).
Auto K = {{autoK}} based on current round.
diversitySections.entropyGuidedHelp: Positions where EVOLVEpro scores multiple substitutions similarly get an uncertainty bonus. Auto weight = {{autoEntropy}} based on current round.
diversitySections.entropyWeightTitle: Manual entropy weight override (ignored when Round > 0)
diversitySections.randomSeedHelp: Leave blank for fresh randomness. Set a seed to reproduce random baseline comparisons exactly.

candidatePopover.backendUnavailable: Backend alternatives are unavailable until you re-design this workspace. Manual primer evaluation still works.
candidatePopover.rankedByPenalty: Ranked by penalty (lower = better). #1 is auto-selected as default.
candidatePopover.colPenTitle: Penalty = Tm deviation + GC deviation + codon changes + hairpin/homodimer

manifestDiff.title: Compare run manifests
manifestDiff.descriptionChanged: {{count}} item(s) differ between the two manifests.

failedMutationPopover.suggestionTip: Suggestion uses median Tm ({{tmFwd}}/{{tmRev}}/{{tmOv}}°C) and observed GC/length ranges from {{count}} successful primers, with tol ±{{tolMax}}°C.
failedMutationPopover.errorNoCandidates: No candidates found with these parameters

logPanel.titleTooltip: Sidecar progress log. Drag to move.
logPanel.copyAriaLabel: Copy all log messages to clipboard

reRunManifest.title: Confirm re-run
reRunManifest.description: Reproduce the same job from the saved manifest.
reRunManifest.warningBody: Identical output is not guaranteed. Do you want to continue?
reRunManifest.exportOnlyNotice: This manifest is an export-only operation and cannot be re-run directly. Re-export from the original data.

polymeraseEditor.title: Custom Polymerase
polymeraseEditor.description: Primer design defaults and asymmetric Tm targets for KURO.
polymeraseEditor.tmMethodOption_santalucia_title: SantaLucia 1998 nearest-neighbour parameters. Modern default; accurate for most PCR primers (DNA/DNA, 25-mers, physiological salt).
polymeraseEditor.tmMethodOption_breslauer_title: Breslauer 1986 nearest-neighbour parameters. Legacy table; tends to overestimate Tm vs SantaLucia by 1-3 °C.
polymeraseEditor.saltOption_owczarzy_title: Owczarzy 2004/2008 monovalent + Mg²⁺ correction. Recommended when Mg²⁺ or dNTP concentrations are non-standard.
polymeraseEditor.saltOption_santalucia_title: SantaLucia 1996 monovalent-only correction. Suitable for standard buffers without Mg²⁺ adjustment.
polymeraseEditor.saltOption_schildkraut_title: Schildkraut-Lifson 1965 empirical Na⁺ correction. Legacy; coarser than Owczarzy or SantaLucia.

autosave.failedWarning: Autosave failed 3 times. Check disk space or permissions.
autosave.autosaveIntro: Autosave is on for this project.

memory.blockDesc: Sidecar process memory reached {{pct}}% ({{rss}} MB). Stop any running jobs and restart the app.

onboarding.descChange: Pick a new default folder. Existing projects stay where they are.
onboarding.descNew: Choose a default folder for projects. kuma keeps every Kuro design and Mame verdict run inside its own project folder so the work survives across weeks-long sequencing turnaround.
onboarding.kuroDesc: Kernel for Upstream Recombination Oligodesign. Batch SDM primer design from Gibson Assembly templates.
onboarding.mameDesc: Mutagenesis Assessment & Microplate Export. Oxford Nanopore NGS verdict.
onboarding.autosaveNote: Inputs and parameters autosave per project. Nothing leaks between projects.
onboarding.descStart: Choose a default folder for projects. kuma keeps every Kuro design and Mame verdict run inside its own project folder so the work survives across weeks-long sequencing turnaround.

appLayout.clearAllDesc: All design results will be lost. Continue?

appLayout.missingMutations: Mutations (enter at least one mutation in the Mutation panel)
appLayout.missingTargetGene: Target gene (select one in the Sequence panel)

overwriteConfirm.title: File already exists
overwriteConfirm.description: already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?

plateMap.platePairDesc: Each page shows one forward plate and its deduplicated reverse partner.
plateMap.exportAllTitle: Open a project first to use Export All.
plateMap.noPlateLayoutDesc: Run design to assign primers to plate wells.

jobQueue.dragTitle: Background job queue. Drag to move.

sequenceInput.targetGeneTitle: CDS region to design primers for. Auto-selected by longest coding sequence.
sequenceInput.organismTitle: Organism codon usage table for mutant codon selection.
sequenceInput.uniprotBlastInProgress: UniProt BLAST search in progress… (Step 2 available after)
sequenceInput.ecoliTitle: Escherichia coli K-12 codon usage table. Use when expressing in E. coli BL21, DH5α, K-12 derivatives.
sequenceInput.bsubtilisTitle: Bacillus subtilis 168 codon usage table. Use when expressing in B. subtilis or related Gram-positive hosts.
sequenceInput.scerevisiaeTitle: Saccharomyces cerevisiae codon usage table. Use when expressing in budding yeast hosts.

uniprotSearch.autoSearchTitle: Search UniProt using gene info from the loaded sequence file

designing.title: Design in progress
designing.description: Primer design is running. Closing now will cancel the job.

analyzing.title: Analysis in progress
analyzing.description: Sequencing data analysis is running. Closing now will cancel the job.

exporting.title: Export in progress
exporting.description: Files are being saved. Closing now may corrupt or discard the output.
exporting.forceCloseWarning: Force-closing during export may corrupt the output file.

networkConsent.title: External database consent
networkConsent.description: This feature calls the following external services. Your sequence data will be sent to those services.
networkConsent.persistNote: Consent persists after restart. You can block external calls at any time by enabling offline mode in Settings.

menuBar.restartSidecarBusyConfirm: A job is running. Restart sidecar anyway?
menuBar.offlineModeDesc: When on, all external service calls are blocked

panel.errorDescription: An error occurred while rendering the component.

handoffButton.label: Start Round {{n}}
handoffButton.disabledTitle: Merge activity data with genotype first to enable handoff

mameParameters.minFilteredDepthHelp: Cutoff based on the number of reads that passed the length-window filter. A more direct depth indicator than FASTA file size, although the current verdict backend still receives a legacy KB cutoff.
mameParameters.minFilteredDepthAria: Minimum filtered depth (reads). Length-window-filtered read count. ONT R10.4.1 consensus reaches Q35+ around 15× depth.
mameParameters.minFilteredDepthFootnote: Length-window-filtered read count. ONT R10.4.1 consensus: Q35+ ~15×. Not auto-converted 1:1 with the KB cutoff.
mameParameters.minFilteredDepthTitle: Length-window-filtered read count. ONT R10.4.1 consensus reaches Q35+ around 15× depth.
mameParameters.legacyKbHelp: Legacy cutoff using FASTA file size as a proxy for read depth. The KB value can vary for the same read count depending on read length, header length, line wrapping, and the consensus/intermediate output format, so it cannot be auto-synced with Filtered Depth.
mameParameters.legacyKbTooltip: File-size-based proxy cutoff. Affected by compression ratio, length distribution, and library variation. Reference only.

runManifest.invalidStructure: Invalid manifest structure. Required fields may be missing: {{path}}
runManifest.unsupportedSchema: Unsupported manifest schema_version: "{{version}}". Current supported version: "{{supported}}". Update kuma, or check whether the manifest was generated by an older version.

reRun.exportNotRunnable: "{{method}}" is an export job. Export manifests cannot be re-run directly. Export again from the source data.

validationDialog.description: Please complete the following before continuing.
